backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor file serving as the backend entry point for the Internet Computer canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two UI changes: replacing hero card text with bilingual health readiness content and changing medical history card background to pale mint green (#EBF3ED).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities including routing, assessment flow, bilingual support, and UI components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light/dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and design system tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for ABL Pulse holistic wellness assessment application with meta tags and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with 10 routes (home, assessment, 4 sections, score summary, services, profile, recommendations) wrapped in AssessmentProvider for global state.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying Root Cause Healing philosophy, four core value cards with icons and hover effects, and integrated founder profile component.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentProgre: Progress bar component showing current section (1-4) and percentage completion with gradient-filled visual indicator.
frontend/src/components/BasicInfoForm.ts: Comprehensive basic info form with bilingual hero card (health readiness score content), personal details fields, and medical history toggles with pale mint green background (#EBF3ED) on medical history card, using localStorage persistence and form validation before navigating to section 1.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Footer component displaying brand info, WhatsApp contact button, social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn), and copyright with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches errors and displays a bilingual (English/Hindi) error UI with retry and reload options.
frontend/src/components/FounderProfile.t: Displays founder Dr. Suman Lal's profile with image, title, 40+ years experience badge, and mission statement in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing hero section with animated background effects, main headline "Small Habits. Big Impact.", and CTAs for health assessment and WhatsApp booking.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading component with ABL logo animation and bilingual loading text with progress bar.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Main navigation bar with logo, menu items (Home, Assessment, About, Contact), language toggle for assessment sections, and responsive mobile/desktop layouts.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard.tsx: Renders individual assessment question with bilingual text and selectable option buttons (Never to Daily scale) with visual feedback.
frontend/src/components/SectionContainer: Container component for assessment sections that displays multiple QuestionCards with bilingual section title and Previous/Next navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Grid layout showcasing four services (Health Score Card, Webinars, 1-on-1 Support, Structured Programs) with icons and descriptions in card format.
React context providing assessment state management including responses (40 questions), current section, language preference, and update functions with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/data/assessmentOptions.ts: Defines bilingual assessment option scale from Never/कभी नहीं (0) to Daily/रोज़ाना (4) with English and Hindi labels.
frontend/src/data/questions/en.ts: Exports English-language health assessment questions organized into four sections covering sleep/hydration, nutrition, exercise/energy, and mental well-being with multiple-choice options.
frontend/src/data/questions/hi.ts: Exports Hindi-language health assessment questions organized into four sections, mirroring the English version with translated text and options.
frontend/src/data/sections/section1.ts: Defines a Question interface and exports 10 dummy bilingual questions (IDs 1-10) for section 1 with English and Hindi text fields.
frontend/src/data/sections/section2.ts: Defines a Question interface and exports 10 dummy bilingual questions (IDs 11-20) for section 2 with English and Hindi text fields.
frontend/src/data/sections/section3.ts: Defines a Question interface and exports 10 dummy bilingual questions (IDs 21-30) for section 3 with English and Hindi text fields.
frontend/src/data/sections/section4.ts: Defines a Question interface and exports 10 dummy bilingual questions (IDs 31-40) for section 4 with English and Hindi text fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBasicInfoStorage.t: Custom hook providing localStorage operations for basic user info (name, age, gender, profession, weight, height, WhatsApp number) with validation for completeness.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for brand theming, dark mode support, custom animations (pulse-glow, electric-wave-flow), and typography using Playfair Display and Montserrat fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Renders the assessment page with logo, back-to-home navigation, and the BasicInfoForm component in a centered layout.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the home page with Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesGrid, AboutSection, and ContactFooter components in a full-height layout.
frontend/src/pages/RecommendedServicesPa: Displays recommended wellness services (webinars, coaching, functional readiness program) based on user assessment results, showing user info card with total score and status.
frontend/src/pages/ScoreSummaryPage.tsx: Shows a summary of assessment scores across all four sections with user info, displays section-wise scores with color-coded borders based on performance categories, and provides navigation to recommended services.
frontend/src/pages/Section1.tsx: Assessment page for Section 1 (Sleep & Hydration) with progress bar, question container, and navigation between basic info and Section 2.
frontend/src/pages/Section1Placeholder.t: Empty placeholder file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/Section2.tsx: Assessment page for Section 2 (Gut Cleanse) with progress bar, question container, and navigation between Section 1 and Section 3.
frontend/src/pages/Section3.tsx: Assessment page for Section 3 (Movement & Breath) with progress bar, question container, and navigation between Section 2 and Section 4.
frontend/src/pages/Section4.tsx: Assessment page for Section 4 (Nutrition & Fuel) with progress bar, question container, and navigation to score summary upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessProfilePage.t: Displays comprehensive wellness profile with user info, total ABL score out of 160, and detailed section-wise scores with color-coded status indicators.
frontend/src/types/assessment.ts: TypeScript type definitions for assessment data structures including BasicInfoFormData, Question, Section, and Language types.
frontend/src/utils/resultsSharingUtils.t: Empty utility file with no content, likely intended for future results sharing functionality.
frontend/src/utils/scoringUtils.ts: Utility functions for calculating assessment scores (4 sections of 10 questions each, max 40 points per section), determining score categories (alert/needsWork/optimal), and providing color/label mappings for UI display.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette using OKLCH color space, brand colors (beige/sage green), custom fonts (Playfair Display, Montserrat), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking a bilingual health readiness score web app with two active features: replacing hero card content with specific English/Hindi text and changing Medical History card background to sage green (#EBF3ED).
